overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a player walking through a secure industrial checkpoint at night. The player passes security personnel, navigates around barriers and trucks, and proceeds through foggy urban environments with futuristic architecture toward a tunnel entrance.

segments.scene_description: The player begins walking through a secure industrial checkpoint at night. Blue tarp-covered barriers line the left side while a checkpoint booth stands ahead. The area is dimly lit by artificial lights with a tall building displaying a 06 sign visible in the foggy distance.

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a security guard standing near a parked black truck in the checkpoint area. Yellow concrete barriers line the right side of the road. The guard stands with arms crossed as the player passes by closely, continuing toward an open plaza area.

segments.scene_description: The player navigates around the large truck and enters an open plaza area with helipad markings on the ground. A worker in a yellow safety vest stands near equipment on the right. The player approaches an industrial building with large satellite dishes visible on the roof, eventually entering a narrow corridor.

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow concrete corridor between tall industrial walls. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed. Ahead, a tunnel entrance looms with rows of red warning lights illuminating the path forward, while a parked car sits on the right side near the tunnel mouth.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a secure industrial checkpoint that gradually narrows into a dark, enclosed tunnel entrance. It begins by moving past blue tarp-covered barriers and a checkpoint booth under dim artificial lights, with a tall building marked 06 looming in the foggy distance. As the camera advances, it passes a security guard standing by a black truck and yellow concrete barriers before opening up into a wide plaza featuring helipad markings and a worker in a safety vest. The scene then shifts toward an industrial building topped with satellite dishes, leading the camera into a restrictive concrete corridor between towering walls. Finally, the environment grows darker and more oppressive as the path turns toward a tunnel mouth illuminated by rows of red warning lights and a parked car.
